featureName: BUG-004: Learning Path Missing Time Estimation

Added time-estimation fields to LearningResource and LearningPath; SQL projects content_length and duration_str; estimateReadingTime handles articles, videos, and unknown types.
Added TestEstimateReadingTime_* family in learning_test.go covering Article, ShortArticle, ZeroLength, YouTube, YouTubeNoDuration, PDF, UnknownType, YouTubeRoundsUp.
Re-verified field wiring via grep on learning.go; all TestEstimateReadingTime_* and TestLearningPath_ResourcesSortedByDifficulty PASS.
./smackerel.sh check clean; Learning-scoped regression run passed (ok 0.019s).
Bug re-certified done. All 7 DoD items checked with file:line evidence.
